description: Wrote the full podcast hosting review protocol inline in Harper's agent file instead of creating a dedicated skill file and registering it in the manifest. Bypassed the lazy loading architecture entirely. Also failed to log the self-correction to error-log.json after identifying the mistake — required explicit instruction from David a second time.
correction: Create a skill file (skills/harper-podcast-review/SKILL.md), register it in _manifest.jsonl, reference only the trigger in the agent file. After any self-correction is identified, log it to error-log.json immediately in the same response — do not wait for David to ask.
systemic_fix: When operating without the Master/sub-agent spawn architecture, Chief must own the full error logging loop. Self-corrections blocks are not a substitute for writing to error-log.json. The log write is non-negotiable regardless of which agent caught the error.
